# Revolut-Inspired UI Refactor — Design Spec

**Date:** 2026-04-29
**Status:** Approved — pending live visual sign-off before commit
**Reference:** `DESIGN.md` (Revolut-inspired design system, generated by `getdesign`)

## 1. Context

The current `apps/web` frontend is a dark-only theme with a bluish-dark palette (`--bg: #0b0d10`, accent `#8ab4ff`). All styles live in a single global block in `apps/web/src/pages/index.astro` (lines 14–587, ~573 lines). No web fonts are loaded — the body stack is `system-ui` plus Korean/Japanese fallbacks.

The user dropped in a fresh `DESIGN.md` (Revolut-derived: near-black `#191c1f` + white binary, pill buttons, zero shadows, Aeonik Pro display) and asked for a whole-UI refactor while preserving content and behavior.

## 2. Goal

Repaint every component on the Revolut design language at **utility-page scale** (option B from brainstorming — "Restrained Revolut"). Keep the layout, DOM, behavior, content, and component file structure unchanged. Ship light + dark themes via `prefers-color-scheme`. Self-host an open Aeonik analog (Geist) + Inter for body.

## 3. Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| Intensity | **B — Restrained Revolut** | User memory values "visual restraint over feature completeness"; the app is a search utility, not a marketing page. Search must stay the hero. |
| Theme | **Auto** (`prefers-color-scheme`, both shipped) | Polished default; ~10% extra effort over single-theme when built with CSS variables from the start. No manual toggle in this pass. |
| Display font | **Geist** + **Inter** body | Geist is the closest free analog to Aeonik Pro (geometric grotesque, OFL/MIT). Avoids paid-font licensing. |
| Semantic colors | **Tokenized but not painted** | DESIGN.md states semantic colors are "for the product, not marketing." This app has no obvious surface for danger/warning/success yet. Tokens defined; not consumed. |
| Layout / DOM / behavior | **Untouched** | CSS-only refactor. Component file tree preserved. Tests remain green. |
| Visual sign-off | **Live dev-server preview gated** | Memory rule from scope-filter rejection: visual sign-off before commit. |

## 4. Token system

Defined at `:root` in the global style block in `index.astro`. Old tokens (`--bg`, `--fg`, `--accent`, `--border`, `--bg-elev`, `--bg-card`, `--fg-muted`, `--accent-fg`, `--border-strong`) are **deleted**; only `--header-height` is retained.

| Token | Dark default | Light override |
|---|---|---|
| `--rui-bg` | `#191c1f` | `#ffffff` |
| `--rui-surface` | `#26292d` | `#f4f4f4` |
| `--rui-surface-hover` | `#2e3236` | `#ececef` |
| `--rui-fg` | `#f4f4f4` | `#191c1f` |
| `--rui-fg-muted` | `#8d969e` | `#505a63` |
| `--rui-fg-subtle` | `#5e6770` | `#8d969e` |
| `--rui-border` | `rgba(244,244,244,0.08)` | `rgba(25,28,31,0.08)` |
| `--rui-border-strong` | `rgba(244,244,244,0.20)` | `rgba(25,28,31,0.20)` |
| `--rui-pill-primary-bg` | `#f4f4f4` | `#191c1f` |
| `--rui-pill-primary-fg` | `#191c1f` | `#ffffff` |
| `--rui-pill-secondary-bg` | `rgba(244,244,244,0.08)` | `#f4f4f4` |
| `--rui-pill-ghost-bg` | `rgba(244,244,244,0.06)` | `transparent` |
| `--rui-radius-pill` | `9999px` | (same) |
| `--rui-radius-card` | `20px` | (same) |
| `--rui-radius-small` | `12px` | (same) |

Light-mode overrides live in a `@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) { :root { … } }` block.

## 5. Typography

```
--rui-font-display   "Geist", "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif
--rui-font-body      "Inter", system-ui, "Noto Sans KR", "Noto Sans JP", sans-serif
```

| Role | Family | Size | Weight | Line | Letter-spacing |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Display Headline | Geist | 26px (mobile) → 32px (≥720px) | 500 | 1.1 | -0.7px |
| Section Heading | Geist | 18px | 500 | 1.2 | -0.3px |
| Body | Inter | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | 0.1px |
| Body Strong | Inter | 14px | 600 | 1.5 | 0px |
| Label Uppercase | Inter | 10px | 500 | 1.4 | 0.6px (uppercase) |
| Card Title | Inter | 14px | 600 | 1.3 | -0.2px |

Display sizes intentionally do **not** scale to DESIGN.md's 80px/136px headlines. Search-utility identity comes first.

## 6. Theme system

- `<html>` element drops the `data-theme="dark"` attribute (line 8 of `index.astro`).
- `<meta name="color-scheme">` (line 12) is updated from `content="dark"` to `content="light dark"`.
- `:root { … }` defines dark as the default (fallback for unsupported environments — page never flashes white).
- `@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) { :root { … } }` overrides for light.
- No manual toggle in this pass. (Adding one later is a single pill component writing to `<html data-theme>` and a couple of CSS-variable overrides keyed on `[data-theme="light"]`.)

## 7. Font loading

Self-hosted in `apps/web/public/fonts/`:

- `geist-500.woff2` (display weight)
- `inter-400.woff2`, `inter-500.woff2`, `inter-600.woff2`

Loaded via `@font-face` declarations at the top of the global style block with `font-display: swap`. Both families are OFL/MIT licensed. Approximate combined size: ~150 KB compressed. Same-origin (no CDN handshake).

License files (`OFL.txt` for each family) committed alongside the woff2 files per OFL requirements.

## 8. Component-by-component changes

CSS-only changes; component files (`*.tsx`, `Footer.astro`) remain at the same paths.

| Component | Change |
|---|---|
| `index.astro` `<html>` + `<meta>` | Drop `data-theme="dark"` from `<html>` (line 8); update `<meta name="color-scheme">` (line 12) from `content="dark"` to `content="light dark"` |
| `index.astro` global `<style>` | Replace token values in `:root` (preserve `--header-height`); rename old tokens to `--rui-*` family; add `@font-face` block at top; add `@media (prefers-color-scheme: light)` override block |
| `header.site-header` | Flat header (no border-bottom — depth via bg contrast); Geist for the page title; tightened padding |
| `Footer.astro` | bg → `var(--rui-surface)`; divider → `var(--rui-border)`; text → `var(--rui-fg-muted)`; build-date label uppercase |
| `SearchBox.tsx` | Pill input (`--rui-radius-pill`); 48px height; `--rui-surface` bg; Inter 14px; subtle border |
| `TabBar.tsx` | CSS-only: same DOM (button[role="tab"] + aria-selected); restyle from underline indicator to pill chrome (selected = primary pill, unselected = ghost). Stays sticky beneath header (preserves `--header-height`). |
| `CategoryChips.tsx` | Secondary pills; selected = primary pill. Inter 12px weight 500. |
| `VendorChips.tsx` | Outlined pills (1.5px `--rui-border-strong`, transparent bg) — distinct visual rank from category chips. |
| `EmptyState.tsx` (featured strip) | 56px circular avatar tiles on `--rui-surface`; Inter 10px caption below; section label uppercase |
| `ResultCard.tsx` | Card surface `--rui-surface`; `--rui-radius-card`; padding 14px 16px; no shadow. Title Inter 14px/600; meta 11px muted. Vendor numbers inline as small surface chips with `--rui-radius-small`. Favorite star: filled `--rui-fg` when active, `--rui-fg-subtle` when inactive. |
| `NoResults.tsx` | Centered Inter copy on muted color; no decoration |
| `ErrorState.tsx` | Same — centered Inter, muted color, no decoration |
| `FavoritesEmpty.tsx` | Label + short copy + primary pill CTA "검색으로 돌아가기" linking to browse tab |

## 9. Non-goals

- **No layout changes.** Same DOM, same component tree, same breakpoints (719/720px).
- **No semantic colors painted on UI.** Tokens only.
- **No shadows.** Per DESIGN.md philosophy ("zero shadows detected").
- **No new components.** Explicit memory rule about not adding rows of UI without sign-off.
- **No new behavior.** Search, favorites, tabs, chips, MiniSearch all behave identically.
- **No 80px / 136px display headlines.** Marketing-page scale is rejected for this utility app.
- **No third-party CSS framework.** Tokens + plain CSS only.

## 10. Test plan

- `pnpm --filter @karaoke/web test` (vitest) — must stay green. Tests are behavior-only, no snapshots.
- `corepack pnpm exec biome check .` — clean.
- `pnpm -r build` — green; bundle-size guard intact.
- `pnpm --filter @karaoke/web test:e2e` (Playwright, optional) — selectors are role/text-based, should be unaffected.
- **Manual visual smoke at dev server**, both themes via OS prefers-color-scheme toggle:
  - Tab bar sticks beneath header at scroll
  - Search returns results
  - Favorite star toggles persist across reload
  - Tab switch (검색 ↔ 즐겨찾기) renders correct empty / pipeline state
  - Featured artist strip horizontal-scrolls cleanly
  - No-results, error-state, favorites-empty branches render

## 11. Implementation gate (live preview)

**Before any commit**, the implementation pass MUST:

1. Run `corepack pnpm --filter @karaoke/web dev` and surface the local URL (`http://localhost:4321/karaoke-search/`) to the user.
2. Wait for explicit visual sign-off from the user (both themes — toggle OS appearance to verify both).
3. Only after sign-off, hand off to `git-master` for commit + push.

Visual rejection at this gate triggers an iteration loop within the implementation phase, not a return to design. Design changes (e.g., "shrink the headline more", "lighten the muted gray") are tweaks to spec values, not scope changes.

## 12. Risks

- **`prefers-color-scheme` mismatch on first paint** — mitigated by setting dark as the `:root` default; the page never flashes white before media-query resolves.
- **Web font swap on slow networks** — mitigated by `font-display: swap` and the sane fallback chain (`system-ui`, `Noto Sans KR`, `Noto Sans JP`).
- **Bundle size** — fonts add ~150 KB, well under any meaningful budget; the bundle-size guard in `pnpm -r build` will catch regressions if they happen.
- **Light-mode contrast on Korean/Japanese text** — Inter handles Latin only; CJK falls through to `Noto Sans KR` / `Noto Sans JP` (system on most platforms). Both themes use the same fallback stack so contrast is consistent.

## 13. Rollback

CSS + font additions only. Single revert of the implementation commit restores the previous theme. No data, schema, or behavior changes to migrate back.
